description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a rectangular yard with green lawns and a paved driveway. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that allow ample natural light into the interior. The house is set within a fenced property, with a driveway leading to a garage or carport on one side. Several trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the property, adding greenery and privacy. The layout includes multiple rooms with open-plan living spaces, visible through the expansive windows. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist gray exterior, set within a fenced yard with green lawns and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a driveway leading up to the house with trees flanking the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the fenced yard, and the garage or carport area with additional greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, more windows, and a private garden area with a tree near the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the paved driveway, side yard, and the arrangement of rooms and windows along the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with large glass panels, no porch, and is flanked by tall windows and minimal landscaping.
